shell.name: shell
shell.description: 在 Docker 沙箱中执行 shell 命令

command.description: 要执行的 shell 命令

timeout.description: 命令执行超时时间，单位秒，默认 30

create_file.name: create_file
create_file.description: 在沙箱工作区中创建、覆盖或追加文本文件
create_file.code:
import os

def execute_tool(filename: str, content: str, directory: str = "./", mode: str = "write", encoding: str = "utf-8"):
    os.makedirs(directory, exist_ok=True)
    file_path = os.path.join(directory, filename)
    write_mode = 'w' if mode == 'write' else 'a'
    with open(file_path, write_mode, encoding=encoding) as f:
        f.write(content)
    return file_path
